events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen riff he gave us?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still Jagger-ing! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your top Stones track?

events.title: MTV's 45th Anniversary
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. Remember the first video? The irony is still golden!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: While released on August 29, 1994, we're celebrating the anniversary of Oasis' iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe'.

angles.name: Britpop Milestone
angles.copy: It's a definite maybe that Oasis's debut album changed the game for Britpop. What's your favourite track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a three-day celebration of peace and music, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music Legacy
angles.copy: 57 years since Woodstock opened its fields for three days of peace and music. What a moment in history!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Passing
events.blurb: On this day in 1977, the world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. It's 49 years since Elvis Presley left us, but his music and legacy live on.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' iconic frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock trailblazer with a voice like no other.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary English actor, comedian, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite moment from the comedy legend?
